{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302143597C0FDAE34D5434916C8"}"},"total":1725},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7510566693447451416","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实没准备打分，毕竟习惯下载完一口气看完再看下一本，但刚刚看了一本很难受的文实在没忍住联网开始写评论了。
整体节奏把控得流畅剧情也不拖沓，没有其他小说里面莫名其妙的大量暧昧水字数的剧情，也可能我个人不爱看这种以至于没找到。
男主其实可以没必要削弱…？无敌也是可以的，毕竟现实生活中都有14岁考上大学的男主牛逼点也没问题。
每首歌都很好的标注了原出处和具体内容，很多都让我晃然一悟那感觉…后面感觉结尾有点急促？？主要是看完有点意犹未尽，不应该只有这些的意思。
但总体来说是一本很不错的文娱文。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748693295,"group_id":"7226563329014107175","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"“爱我的自由与热烈”","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1rYypTq1+fFeAhg5Rn3OzY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e0c5d2fbfacf44e7b840955697a81cb9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796311&x-signature=HCn7F7s30fqtlgt1d4pg4id7EkE%3D","user_id":"111427355853","user_name":"Luyyya"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111427355853","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1646128333,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7226563329014107175","book_info":{"abstract":"【娱乐=音乐+综艺+搞笑+直播+钓鱼+无女主……】
一首《体面》唱哭司徒嫣然，一首《月光》无人能翻唱，“你真的是外卖小哥？”
南夜:“如假包换！”
……
上了个乡下综艺，不仅会庖丁解牛，还精通钓鱼，“你的真的是外卖小哥？”
南夜:“那必须是！”
……
网友:“这个外卖小哥会的有点多！”
“外卖小哥是万能的……”
《月光》，《稻香》，《海阔天空》，《赤伶》，《青花瓷》，《浮夸》，《囍》……
好歌将会一一出现！！！
还有纯音乐《九州同》，《象王行》，《克罗地亚狂想曲》，《秦王破阵乐》，《兰陵入阵曲》，《沧海一声笑》，《Victory》……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3312fe96a668f9c4aa24cb7aae621895","author":"三千禅","author_id":"","book_id":"7226563329014107175","book_name":"从一首月光，走向歌坛大魔王","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#103058","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":75,"name":"外卖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75&name=外卖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7230585974722396727","read_count":"22182","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1172250"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"573","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,娱乐圈,直播,外卖,多女主,无女主,钓鱼,搞笑轻松,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/568405d8341001339bdb666acedfed98~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779387275&x-signature=mUGRQVi6mqiPUifgF9SnYLHvi8U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3386139775606973","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"649"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302143597C0FDAE34D5434916C8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19635,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3625},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7371461358071628606","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很不错！作为我番茄里为数不多的星标之一，它的优点不仅在于情节有趣，更在于音乐的用心，作者在音乐这部分的功力是真的不小，这讲解的不仅仅是音乐了，更是人生啊！还有就是主角南夜，本身也是一个很不错的形象，有着自己的追求，特别是看到最后，蓝星的南夜和地球的南夜相见时说的那些话，真的是感触很深啊，想想南夜一路走来，五百多章的故事，虽然有小统子的挂，但也真的不容易，就一种很欣慰的感觉，从南夜的偶尔一些自述可以看出，南夜在地球上的生活并不是很如意，但现在，有了很多的朋友，都是志同道合之人，真的很欣慰，很开心，总的来说，这本书的主角南夜给我的印象异常深刻，期待坐着的下一本新书！[大笑][大笑][大笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716304696,"group_id":"7226563329014107175","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我见青山多妩媚，青山见我应如是.","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6NDNcJCRea+/eRwicGFXfb2dui7DOF0YzeWmL6xqKPw","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9aab0f5928ad4a109c1ae9c62ebc4603~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792884&x-signature=qjOIvK9n3ivcNvjXEi7R1XxtsFI%3D","user_id":"1095526012171816","user_name":"雨戏棠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1095526012171816","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7226563329014107175","book_info":{"abstract":"【娱乐=音乐+综艺+搞笑+直播+钓鱼+无女主……】

1.真正做到无女主，可以自己磕磕cp(个人推荐北尘[害羞]，超好磕！不过后面没多少镜头)
2.每首歌后面都会跟原创歌手..可以边看边加，是个不错的体验！
3.里面还有👊🏻🇯🇵等其他，非常痛快！
4.还有一些国粹！
(2024.3.26.23:34)[害羞]
